zh.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai於1176年出生在艾歐洛。她和Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai于1176年出生在艾歐洛。她和Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.
Shortened form of French   Lamontagne  .

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
French:
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tournai
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English:  see  Turney  .

variants.name: Turney
meanings: English (of Norman origin):
habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

en.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai was born in 1176, in Europe. She had at least 1 son with Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai est née en 1176, à Europe. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.

de.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai wurde 1176 in Europa geboren. Sie hatte mit Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai è nata il nel 1176 nel Europa. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournaiは1176年にヨーロッパで生まれた。彼女はGauthier Desprest de Quiévrainとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai(은)는 1176년 우럽에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai nasceu em 1176, em Europa. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai родилась в 1176 г. в местности Европа. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.

es.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Mortagne de Tournai nació en 1176, en Europa. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gauthier Desprest de Quiévrain.
